_meta.purpose: Plain-language descriptions used in R1 skill offers. Bilingual envelope: ar null falls back to en (output_gate translates the composed reply for Arabic sessions). When clinician-authored Khaleeji blurbs land, they become the verbatim display names echoed in offers and accept-classification.
review_required: Clinical review of every display_name and description before production
_meta._signed_off: EN blurb wording clinician-approved 2026-06-13; ar pending S2-2 + two-rater Khaleeji scoring. NOTE: this records clinician content approval only; the two-rater EN offer-turn QUALITY scoring is a SEPARATE gate and is NOT yet complete (gates PR #4 merge).

description.en: a short guided breathing exercise, around five minutes, that helps your body settle when it feels wound up
a quick exercise using your five senses to come back to the present moment, takes a few minutes
a one minute pause technique for catching yourself before reacting in a heated moment
a fast physical reset using cold water and movement for very intense moments, about ten minutes
a guided exercise tensing and releasing muscle groups to let go of physical tension, ten to fifteen minutes
a calming exercise where you picture a place that feels safe and settle into it, about ten minutes
a slow check-in through your body to notice and release tension, ten to fifteen minutes
a step by step way to take one heavy thought and test how true it really is, ten to fifteen minutes
working through a stuck thought pattern and finding a fairer way to see it, ten to fifteen minutes
picking one small doable activity to lift the week, planned together in about ten minutes
a way to contain spinning worries by giving them a fixed daily slot instead of the whole day, ten minutes to set up
breaking one real problem into options and a first step you choose, ten to fifteen minutes
going through what is disrupting your sleep and building a wind down routine that fits you, about ten minutes
a short guided check-in on how you are really doing, about five minutes
a quick way to weigh how ready you feel for a change you have been considering, about five minutes
exploring what you care about most so decisions get easier, ten to fifteen minutes
preparing how to say a hard thing clearly and kindly, with practice, ten to fifteen minutes
a structured way to prepare a difficult ask or set a limit with someone, ten to fifteen minutes
a short practice for being as kind to yourself as you would be to a friend, about five minutes
practicing how to notice difficult thoughts without being dragged around by them, about ten minutes
a plain language walk through of how anxiety works in the body and what actually helps, about ten minutes
a plain language walk through of how low mood feeds itself and what helps break the loop, about ten minutes
a plain language walk through of what stress does to you and practical ways to lower it, about ten minutes
working through money stress step by step and finding one thing in your control, ten to fifteen minutes
gentle guided space to be with a loss at your own pace, no fixing, about fifteen minutes
